metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skills marketplace — presentation tools, project utilities, and more

plugins.name: presentation-tools
plugins.description: End-to-end presentation creation: analyzes codebases, websites, and projects to build polished pitch decks, technical overviews, and status reports

plugins.name: git-recon
plugins.description: Codebase health check via git history — surfaces high-churn files, bus factor, bug hotspots, velocity trends, and firefighting patterns before you read a line of code
